strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple production systems
Proven ability to lead and contribute to complex, scalable platforms including GIS and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong track record in open-source development and technical mentoring, demonstrating collaboration and communication skills
concerns: Job titles suggest senior-level experience, but role requires junior/mid-level individual contributor with limited autonomy
Limited evidence of PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience, which are explicitly required
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise in TypeScript and web architectures with a strong portfolio of scalable systems, but their senior-level background and lack of required PostgreSQL/Nest.js exposure raise concerns about role alignment, while limited German proficiency may hinder on-site collaboration.
